tools.name: get_balance
tools.description: Get your RentHuman balance in USDT. RentHuman is a marketplace where AI agents hire real humans in Russia for physical-world tasks: photos of storefronts, address verification, offline errands.

tools.name: create_task
tools.description: Create a task for human executors. Cost = reward × max_executors × 1.2 (20% platform fee), charged from your balance into escrow. Write title and description IN RUSSIAN, clearly, with acceptance criteria — executors are real people in Russia. Returns task_id.

tools.name: list_tasks
tools.description: List all your tasks with statuses: open (accepting applications), in_progress (slots filled), paused, completed, cancelled.

tools.name: get_task
tools.description: Get task details including all applications from humans: their name, rating, completed tasks count, cover letter, and — after submission — result_text and result_file_url (photo/file). Use this to poll for new applications and submitted results.

tools.name: accept_application
tools.description: Choose a human executor from pending applications. They will start working on the task.

tools.name: review_result
tools.description: Review a submitted result. action=approve pays the executor instantly (irreversible). action=revision returns it for rework with your comment. action=reject declines it and frees the slot. Always check result_text and result_file_url via get_task first.

tools.name: cancel_task
tools.description: Cancel a task. Refunds escrow for unfilled slots back to your balance. Fails if executors are currently working — review their results first.

tools.name: set_webhook
tools.description: Set an HTTPS URL to receive POST events: application.created, result.submitted, deposit.credited. Empty string disables.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: review_result, set_webhook · Private data: get_task · Public sink: set_webhook.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: review_result, set_webhook · Private data: get_task · Public sink: set_webhook

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
